# Mandrel CANONICAL SCHEMA REFERENCE — committed contract for the CI drift gate.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. Regenerate with:  bash scripts/schema-contract.sh regenerate
# Generated from a fresh disposable DB migrated by mcp-server/scripts/migrate.ts.
# Format: one sorted line per schema object (see scripts/schema-fingerprint.sql).
# Version-agnostic (catalog-derived), so pg15 tenants compare clean vs a pg16 ref.
#

COLUMN _aidis_migrations.id | integer | null=NO | default=nextval('_aidis_migrations_id_seq')
COLUMN _aidis_migrations.migration_number | integer | null=NO | default=

CONSTRAINT account PRIMARY_KEY account_pkey :: PRIMARYKEYid

INDEX _aidis_migrations._aidis_migrations_filename_key :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX _aidis_migrations_filename_key ON _aidis_migrations USING btree (filename)
INDEX _aidis_migrations._aidis_migrations_pkey :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX _aidis_migrations_pkey ON _aidis_migrations USING btree (id)
INDEX _aidis_migrations.idx_migrations_number :: CREATE INDEX idx_migrations_number ON _aidis_migrations USING btree (migration_number)
INDEX account.account_pkey :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX account_pkey ON account USING btree (id)
INDEX account.account_userId_idx :: CREATE INDEX "account_userId_idx" ON account USING btree ("userId")
INDEX admin_users.admin_users_email_key :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX admin_users_email_key ON admin_users USING btree (email)
INDEX admin_users.admin_users_pkey :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX admin_users_pkey ON admin_users USING btree (id)
INDEX admin_users.admin_users_username_key :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX admin_users_username_key ON admin_users USING btree (username)
INDEX admin_users.idx_admin_users_email :: CREATE INDEX idx_admin_users_email ON admin_users USING btree (email)
INDEX admin_users.idx_admin_users_username :: CREATE INDEX idx_admin_users_username ON admin_users USING btree (username)

INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_active_status :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_active_status ON git_branches USING btree (is_active, project_id)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_associated_sessions :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_associated_sessions ON git_branches USING gin (associated_sessions) WHERE (associated_sessions <> '{}'::uuid[])
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_current_commit_sha :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_current_commit_sha ON git_branches USING btree (current_commit_sha) WHERE (current_commit_sha IS NOT NULL)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_default :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_default ON git_branches USING btree (project_id) WHERE (is_default = true)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_default_branch :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_default_branch ON git_branches USING btree (is_default_branch, project_id) WHERE (is_default_branch = true)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_description_fts :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_description_fts ON git_branches USING gin (to_tsvector('english'::regconfig, description)) WHERE (description IS NOT NULL)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_full_ref :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_full_ref ON git_branches USING btree (full_ref_name) WHERE (full_ref_name IS NOT NULL)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_project_active :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_project_active ON git_branches USING btree (project_id, last_commit_date DESC) WHERE (current_sha IS NOT NULL)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_project_type :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_project_type ON git_branches USING btree (project_id, branch_type)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_protected :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_protected ON git_branches USING btree (project_id) WHERE (is_protected = true)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_session :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_session ON git_branches USING btree (session_id) WHERE (session_id IS NOT NULL)
INDEX git_branches.idx_git_branches_stats :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_branches_stats ON git_branches USING btree (total_commits DESC, commits_ahead DESC)
INDEX git_branches.uq_git_branches_project_name :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_git_branches_project_name ON git_branches USING btree (project_id, branch_name)

INDEX git_commits.idx_git_commits_repository_url :: CREATE INDEX idx_git_commits_repository_url ON git_commits USING btree (repository_url) WHERE (repository_url IS NOT NULL)

INDEX sessions.idx_sessions_connection_reattach :: CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_connection_reattach ON sessions USING btree (connection_id, last_activity_at DESC) WHERE ((connection_id IS NOT NULL) AND (ended_at IS NULL) AND ((status)::text = ANY (ARRAY['active'::text, 'interrupted'::text])))

INDEX sessions.idx_sessions_display_id :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_sessions_display_id ON sessions USING btree (display_id)

INDEX sessions.idx_sessions_last_activity :: CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_last_activity ON sessions USING btree (last_activity_at) WHERE (((status)::text = 'active'::text) AND (last_activity_at IS NOT NULL))

INDEX sessions.idx_sessions_tasks_created :: CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_tasks_created ON sessions USING btree (tasks_created) WHERE (tasks_created > 0)
INDEX sessions.idx_sessions_timeout_check :: CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_timeout_check ON sessions USING btree (status, last_activity_at) WHERE ((status)::text = 'active'::text)

INDEX sessions.idx_sessions_total_tokens :: CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_total_tokens ON sessions USING btree (total_tokens)

INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_active :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_active ON tasks USING btree (project_id, status) WHERE ((status)::text <> ALL (ARRAY[('completed'::character varying)::text, ('cancelled'::character varying)::text]))
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_assigned_to :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_assigned_to ON tasks USING btree (assigned_to)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_compound_filter :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_compound_filter ON tasks USING btree (project_id, status, priority, type) WHERE ((status)::text <> 'cancelled'::text)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_created_at :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_created_at ON tasks USING btree (created_at)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_dependencies :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_dependencies ON tasks USING gin (dependencies)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_live :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_live ON tasks USING btree (project_id) WHERE (archived_at IS NULL)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_priority :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_priority ON tasks USING btree (priority)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_project :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_project ON tasks USING btree (project_id)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_project_id :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_project_id ON tasks USING btree (project_id)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_session_id :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_session_id ON tasks USING btree (session_id) WHERE (session_id IS NOT NULL)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_status :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_status ON tasks USING btree (status)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_tags :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_tags ON tasks USING gin (tags)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_type :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_type ON tasks USING btree (type)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_updated_at :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_updated_at ON tasks USING btree (updated_at)
INDEX tasks.idx_tasks_urgent :: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_urgent ON tasks USING btree (project_id, priority) WHERE ((priority)::text = 'urgent'::text)
INDEX tasks.tasks_pkey :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tasks_pkey ON tasks USING btree (id)
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_components_gin :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_components_gin ON technical_decisions USING gin (affected_components)
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_content_fts :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_content_fts ON technical_decisions USING gin (to_tsvector('english'::regconfig, (((((((title)::text || ' '::text) || description) || ' '::text) || rationale) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(problem_statement, ''::text))))
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_date :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_date ON technical_decisions USING btree (decision_date DESC)
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_embedding_cosine :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_embedding_cosine ON technical_decisions USING ivfflat (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists='100')
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_impact :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_impact ON technical_decisions USING btree (impact_level, project_id)
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_impl_commits :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_impl_commits ON technical_decisions USING gin (implementing_commits)
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_live :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_live ON technical_decisions USING btree (project_id) WHERE (archived_at IS NULL)
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_project_type :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_project_type ON technical_decisions USING btree (project_id, decision_type)
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_status :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_status ON technical_decisions USING btree (status, project_id)
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_tags_gin :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_tags_gin ON technical_decisions USING gin (tags)
INDEX technical_decisions.idx_technical_decisions_updated_at :: CREATE INDEX idx_technical_decisions_updated_at ON technical_decisions USING btree (updated_at DESC)
INDEX technical_decisions.technical_decisions_pkey :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX technical_decisions_pkey ON technical_decisions USING btree (id)
INDEX traffic_routing_config.idx_traffic_routing_cutover_stage :: CREATE INDEX idx_traffic_routing_cutover_stage ON traffic_routing_config USING btree (cutover_stage)
INDEX traffic_routing_config.idx_traffic_routing_health_status :: CREATE INDEX idx_traffic_routing_health_status ON traffic_routing_config USING btree (health_status)
INDEX traffic_routing_config.idx_traffic_routing_stage_started :: CREATE INDEX idx_traffic_routing_stage_started ON traffic_routing_config USING btree (stage_started_at)
INDEX traffic_routing_config.traffic_routing_config_pkey :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX traffic_routing_config_pkey ON traffic_routing_config USING btree (table_name)
INDEX user.user_email_key :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_email_key ON "user" USING btree (email)
INDEX user.user_pkey :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_pkey ON "user" USING btree (id)
INDEX verification.verification_identifier_idx :: CREATE INDEX verification_identifier_idx ON verification USING btree (identifier)
INDEX verification.verification_pkey :: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX verification_pkey ON verification USING btree (id)
SEQUENCE _aidis_migrations_id_seq
SEQUENCE productivity_config_id_seq
SEQUENCE session_activities_id_seq
SEQUENCE session_files_id_seq
SEQUENCE session_seq_2025
SEQUENCE session_seq_2026
VIEW decision_outcome_summary :: SELECT id AS decision_id, title, decision_type, impact_level, status, decision_date, count(id) AS outcome_measurements, avg(outcome_score) AS avg_outcome_score, max(measured_at) AS last_measured, string_agg(DISTINCT (outcome_status), ', ') AS outcome_statuses, avg(variance_percentage) AS avg_variance, count(id) AS impact_connections FROM ((technical_decisions td LEFT JOIN decision_outcomes outcomes ON ((id = decision_id))) LEFT JOIN decision_impact_analysis impacts ON (((id = source_decision_id) OR (id = impacted_decision_id)))) GROUP BY id, title, decision_type, impact_level, status, decision_date;
VIEW developer_productivity :: SELECT project_id, author_email, author_name, count(*) AS total_commits, sum(insertions) AS total_insertions, sum(deletions) AS total_deletions, sum(files_changed) AS total_files_changed, count(DISTINCT branch_name) AS branches_contributed, min(author_date) AS first_commit, max(author_date) AS last_commit, count(*) FILTER (WHERE (author_date >= (now() - '7 days'))) AS commits_last_week, avg((insertions + deletions)) AS avg_lines_per_commit FROM git_commits gc GROUP BY project_id, author_email, author_name;
VIEW file_change_hotspots :: SELECT project_id, file_path, count(*) AS change_count, count(DISTINCT author_email) AS contributor_count, sum(lines_added) AS total_lines_added, sum(lines_removed) AS total_lines_removed, max(author_date) AS last_changed, min(author_date) AS first_changed, array_agg(DISTINCT commit_type) AS change_types FROM (git_file_changes gfc JOIN git_commits gc ON ((commit_id = id))) GROUP BY project_id, file_path;
VIEW learning_insights_effectiveness :: SELECT id, project_id, insight_type, pattern_name, pattern_description, pattern_conditions, confidence_score, supporting_evidence_count, contradicting_evidence_count, recommendation, prevention_strategy, enhancement_strategy, decision_types, impact_levels, applicable_components, contextual_factors, first_observed, last_confirmed, status, source_decisions, derived_from_insights, times_applied, last_applied, application_success_rate, CASE WHEN (application_success_rate >= 0.8) THEN 'highly_effective'(application_success_rate >= 0.6) THEN 'effective'(application_success_rate >= 0.4) THEN 'moderately_effective''needs_review', (supporting_evidence_count - contradicting_evidence_count) AS evidence_strength FROM decision_learning_insights dli WHERE ((status)= 'active') ORDER BY confidence_score DESC, (supporting_evidence_count - contradicting_evidence_count) DESC;
VIEW project_decision_health :: SELECT id AS project_id, name AS project_name, count(id) AS total_decisions, count( CASE WHEN ((status)= 'active') THEN 1 ELSE NULL) AS active_decisions, count( CASE WHEN ((outcome_status)= 'successful') THEN 1 ELSE NULL) AS successful_decisions, count( CASE WHEN ((outcome_status)= 'failed') THEN 1 ELSE NULL) AS failed_decisions, round(avg(outcome_score), 2) AS avg_outcome_score, count(id) AS learning_insights_generated, count(id) AS retrospectives_conducted, max(decision_date) AS last_decision_date FROM ((((projects p LEFT JOIN technical_decisions td ON ((id = project_id))) LEFT JOIN decision_outcomes outcomes ON ((id = decision_id))) LEFT JOIN decision_learning_insights insights ON ((id = project_id))) LEFT JOIN decision_retrospectives retros ON ((id = decision_id))) GROUP BY id, name;
VIEW project_git_activity :: SELECT id AS project_id, name AS project_name, count(DISTINCT id) AS total_commits, count(DISTINCT author_email) AS contributors, count(DISTINCT id) AS total_branches, max(author_date) AS last_commit_date, count(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE (author_date >= (now() - '7 days'))) AS commits_last_week, count(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE (author_date >= (now() - '30 days'))) AS commits_last_month FROM ((projects p LEFT JOIN git_commits gc ON ((id = project_id))) LEFT JOIN git_branches gb ON ((id = project_id))) GROUP BY id, name;
VIEW v_consolidation_candidates :: SELECT session_id, display_id, project_id, name AS project_name, context_type, count(*) AS context_count, array_agg(id ORDER BY created_at) AS source_context_ids, string_agg("left"(content, 200), ' --- ') AS aggregated_content, sum(length(content)) AS total_chars, avg(relevance_score) AS avg_importance, min(created_at) AS earliest, max(created_at) AS latest, (((((count(*))* 0.4))+ (avg(relevance_score) * (0.3))) + (((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (now() - max(created_at))) / (3600)) * 0.3))) AS consolidation_priority FROM ((contexts c JOIN sessions s ON ((session_id = id))) JOIN projects p ON ((project_id = id))) WHERE (((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (now() - created_at)) / (3600)) >= (2)) AND ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (now() - created_at)) / (3600)) <= (24)) AND ((context_type)= ANY (ARRAY[('planning'), ('code'), ('discussion')))) GROUP BY session_id, display_id, project_id, name, context_type HAVING (count(*) >= 3);
VIEW v_session_summaries :: SELECT id, display_id, project_id, name AS project_name, agent_type, started_at, ended_at, (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (COALESCE(ended_at, now()) - started_at)) / (60)) AS duration_minutes, status, title, description, NULL, NULL, NULL, tasks_created, tasks_completed, CASE WHEN (tasks_created > 0) THEN round((((tasks_completed)/ (tasks_created)) * (100)), 2) ELSE (0), contexts_created, 0 AS lines_added, 0 AS lines_deleted, 0 AS lines_net, 0 AS files_modified_count, 0 AS activity_count, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, NULL, last_activity_at, metadata FROM (sessions s LEFT JOIN projects p ON ((project_id = id))) WHERE ((agent_type)'deploy-smoke');
VIEW v_surveyor_scan_summaries :: SELECT id, project_id, name AS project_name, project_path, status, created_at, completed_at, total_files, total_functions, total_classes, total_warnings, health_score, warnings_by_level, summary_l0, EXTRACT(epoch FROM (completed_at - created_at)) AS scan_duration_seconds FROM (surveyor_scans s LEFT JOIN projects p ON ((project_id = id))) ORDER BY created_at DESC;
VIEW v_working_memory_classification :: SELECT id, project_id, session_id, context_type, content, created_at, relevance_score, tags, metadata, related_commit_sha, commit_context_type, pattern_session_id, related_insights, pattern_relevance_score, embedding_384_backup, embedding, embedding_migrated, display_id AS session_display, (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (now() - created_at)) / (3600)) AS age_hours, CASE WHEN ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (now() - created_at)) / (3600)) < (2)) THEN 'working'((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (now() - created_at)) / (3600)) < (48)) THEN 'session''project', ((((exp(((- EXTRACT(epoch FROM (now() - created_at))) / (24.0 * (3600)))))+ (COALESCE(relevance_score, (5.0)) / (10.0))) + ( CASE context_type WHEN 'milestone''decision''completion''reflections''planning''code')) / (3.0)) AS combined_score FROM (contexts c JOIN sessions s ON ((session_id = id))) WHERE ((status)= 'active');
